tasks.subject: Task 1: claude_statusline crate — parse the statusLine payload
tasks.description:
New pure crate: claude_statusline::parse(&str)->Result<StatuslineSnapshot,StatuslineError>. rate_limits Some/None (None not error), session_cost_micro_usd from total_cost_usd dollars×1e6 round-half-away saturating, schema-drift discipline. Files: crates/claude_statusline/{Cargo.toml,src/lib.rs,errors.rs,types.rs,parse.rs}. Verify: cargo test/clippy/fmt -p claude_statusline. Full code: plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/claude_statusline/Cargo.toml","crates/claude_statusline/src/lib.rs","crates/claude_statusline/src/errors.rs","crates/claude_statusline/src/types.rs","crates/claude_statusline/src/parse.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p claude_statusline && cargo clippy -p claude_statusline --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt -p claude_statusline -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["parse() pure","full→rate_limits+cost; missing→None not error","invalid JSON→InvalidJson; wrong-type→SchemaDrift; unknown tolerated","gates green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Real captured payload fixture + version confirmation
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Commit a REAL maintainer-captured statusLine payload (paths redacted, rate_limits+cost intact) + tests/real_payload.rs asserting rate_limits Some, five_hour Some, session_cost Some; record confirmed Claude Code version. Needs maintainer artifact (recipe already given) — do NOT fabricate; report NEEDS_CONTEXT if absent. Verify: cargo test -p claude_statusline --test real_payload. Full detail: plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/claude_statusline/tests/fixtures/real-payload.json","crates/claude_statusline/tests/real_payload.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p claude_statusline --test real_payload -- --nocapture","acceptanceCriteria":["real captured payload committed (redacted, rate_limits+cost intact)","parse()→rate_limits Some, five_hour Some, session_cost Some","confirmed version recorded"],"userGate":true,"tags":["user-gate"]}
```

tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 4: claude_statusline::wiring — own statusLine stanza in Claude settings.json
tasks.description:
wiring.rs: dual-path locate_settings_path/default_settings_path (shape from anthropic_oauth::credentials), read_wire_status (Unwired/WiredToBalanze/OccupiedBy), wire_statusline atomic preserve-keys idempotent no-clobber (write_back technique, no token/expiresAt logic). tempfile tests mirror credentials.rs. lib.rs adds wiring module+pub use+doc. Verify: cargo test/clippy/fmt -p claude_statusline. Full detail: plan Task 4.
